title: Quantum Industry
description: Quantum Industry is a lightweight, tech-focused Minecraft modpack built on NeoForge, combining powerful automation, energy systems, and digital storage with optimized performance for a smooth gameplay experience.
body:
Quantum Industry is a lightweight, tech-driven Minecraft modpack designed for players who want advanced automation and industry without sacrificing performance. Built on NeoForge 1.21.1, this pack combines powerful technology mods like Create, Mekanism, Powah, and Applied Energistics 2 with essential quality-of-life features and strong performance optimizations.
Whether you’re building sprawling factories, automating resource production, or streamlining digital storage networks, Quantum Industry gives you the tools to engineer your world efficiently. With tuned configs for balance and smooth gameplay, it’s ideal for both solo worlds and servers that want a modern, optimized industrial experience.
